peptides.name: Copper Peptide (GHK-Cu)
peptides.molecular_target: Upregulates collagen, elastin, and decorin synthesis; modulates metalloproteinases.
peptides.clinical_use: Accelerates wound healing, skin rejuvenation, and exhibits anti-inflammatory properties.
peptides.reported_side_effects: Generally none topically; potential flushing or localized irritation if concentration is excessively high.

peptides.name: Argireline (Acetyl Hexapeptide-8)
peptides.molecular_target: Mimics the N-terminal end of the SNAP-25 protein; competitively inhibits the SNARE complex formation to destabilize vesicle release of acetylcholine.
peptides.clinical_use: Topical reduction of expression wrinkle depth caused by repetitive muscle movement.
peptides.reported_side_effects: Exceedingly low toxicity profile; mild skin dryness or peeling in sensitive individuals if overused.

peptides.name: Body Protection Compound-157
peptides.molecular_target: Upregulates Vascular Endothelial Growth Factor (VEGF) expression; accelerates angiogenesis and cell migration pathways.
peptides.clinical_use: Investigational use for accelerating soft tissue repair (tendons, ligaments), gastric ulcer healing, and systemic anti-inflammatory signaling.
peptides.reported_side_effects: Long-term human systemic safety profile data remains restricted; highly variable bio-availability based on route of administration.
